23 June 2026General

Turning 29

personal

So I spent a few hours with an AI agent to revamp my homepage. At first I thought about turning it into a Wikipedia-like page, but on second thought that might expose too much information to the public domain. So I took inspiration from a page I stumbled upon a few days ago, and thought I might just put my blog here as well.

Coincidentally, I turned 29 while just finishing up the page. So yeah, happy birthday to me.

I was thinking about writing more in this blog, but it’s getting late, so I’ll stop here and make the first version of the page live.
